km.Germany: ប្រទេសអាល្លឺម៉ង់

zh.lifeSummary: Johan von Thienen是Johann Von Thienen的兒子，出生。他和Anna至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Johan von Thienen是Johann Von Thienen的儿子，出生。他和Anna至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Thienen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German and Dutch: patronymic from   Thiel  .

variants.name: Thelen
meanings: Dutch and North German: patronymic from a pet form of the ancient Germanic personal name Thietilo. Thelen is a variant of Thielen .

Swedish (Thelén): ornamental or habitational name from the element Thel- of uncertain meaning (see Thelander ) + the adjectival suffix -én, a derivative of Latin -enius ‘relating to’. Compare Thelin .

variants.name: Thiel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Egon, Franz, Reinhard, Wolfgang, Angelika, Arno, Bernhard.

North German, Dutch, and Flemish: from a shortened form of the personal name Thietilo, an early medieval pet form of Dietrich (German), Diederik (Dutch), or from some other compound name with the same first element.
Germanized form of Sorbian, Polish, and Czech   Tyl  , a name which is (at least in part) of the same German origin as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Johan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Older Scottish spelling of Joan , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables.

variants.name: Jan
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: Jon
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: Johan von Thienen was born as the son of Johann Von Thienen. He had at least 1 son with Anna.

fr.lifeSummary: Johan von Thienen est né, fils de Johann Von Thienen. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Anna.

de.lifeSummary: Johan von Thienen wurde, als Sohn von Johann Von Thienen geboren. Er hatte mit Anna mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Johan von Thienen è nato il come figlio di Johann Von Thienen. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Anna.

ja.lifeSummary: Johan von ThienenはJohann Von Thienenの息子として生まれた。彼はAnnaとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Johan von Thienen(은)는 Johann Von Thienen의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Anna(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Johan von Thienen nasceu filho de Johann Von Thienen. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Anna.

ru.lifeSummary: Johan von Thienen родился. Его отца звали Johann Von Thienen. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Anna.

es.lifeSummary: Johan von Thienen nació como hijo de Johann Von Thienen. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Anna.
